title: Introduction to Multiplication

sentences.text: Today, we will learn about multiplication using two and three.
Multiplication means adding groups of the same size together.
Let's multiply two times three, which means two groups of three.
We can visualize this with an array of two rows and three columns.
Can you create an array for two times three at your desk?
Now, let's discuss what you discovered about your array!
Remember, two times three equals six, which is the total.
Great job understanding multiplication today, everyone!

teacherNotes: Encourage students to use their hands to create arrays for better understanding.
